source_ref.compose_env_source: existing 211 runtime env path, not copied or printed

evidence_ref.command: python3 tools/verify_poc_gate.py --frontend-url http://127.0.0.1:18001 --api-url http://127.0.0.1:8020 --frontend-dist <redacted-path> --env-path <existing-211-runtime-env-path> --api-container ai-platform-api --postgres-container ai-platform-postgres --postgres-user ai_platform --postgres-db ai_platform --allow-missing-auth-audit

sdk_task_tool_boundary.reason: child-run admission, quota/backpressure, and audit must remain platform-managed

review_notes: This entry is a redacted summary of the current-main 211 verifier output, not the raw runtime payload.

The evidence record was committed after the verified runtime smoke; commit_sha and runtime_subject_commit_sha identify the verified runtime subject, while Git history identifies the evidence record commit.
The API and worker containers both reported the same image and source revision as this entry before the smoke was recorded.
No secret-bearing environment values, credential header values, DSNs, internal object locators, runtime workspace paths, hidden executor data, or personal Windows paths are included.
The verifier output included internal artifact and file identifiers; those raw fields are intentionally omitted here.

This evidence supports Foundation Alpha POC smoke only. It does not close production concurrency, Docker sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, runtime export, or release-evidence retention gates.
open_followups: #21 recorded multi-tenant capacity/load evidence remains required before raising production concurrency defaults.
G7 Docker sandbox hardening and Docker-capable sandbox smoke remain blocked.
G8 ordinary-user multi-agent exposure remains feature-flagged/internal only.
G9 release-evidence runtime export and retention runtime acceptance remain open.
Packaged frontend image smoke/release acceptance remains separate from this thin-shell POC smoke.
